# Woodcarver's Tools

- **Ability::** Dexterity
- **Utilize::** Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10)
- **Craft::** [[club]], [[greatclub]], [[quarterstaff]], Ranged weapons (except [[pistol]], [[musket]], and [[sling]]), [[arcane_focus Focus]], [[arrows_20]], [[bolts_20]], [[druidic_focus Focus]], [[ink_pen Pen]], [[needles_50]]
